---
name: Release Checklist
about: Pre-release validation checklist
title: 'Release v'
labels: 'type: chore'
assignees: ''
---

## Pre-Release Checklist

### Version
- [ ] `package.json` version updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added with date
- [ ] VERSION file will be generated by installer

### Quality
- [ ] All CI checks passing on main
- [ ] Coverage ≥ 70% on core modules
- [ ] No `npm audit` high/critical vulnerabilities
- [ ] Hook syntax validation passing

### Testing
- [ ] Test suite passes on Node 20, 22, 24
- [ ] Test suite passes on Ubuntu, macOS, Windows
- [ ] Install smoke tests pass (Claude Code, Codex, Copilot)
- [ ] Manual verification of new features

### Documentation
- [ ] README.md updated with new commands/features
- [ ] docs/COMMANDS.md updated
- [ ] docs/FEATURES.md updated
- [ ] docs/USER-GUIDE.md updated
- [ ] Help workflow updated

### Release
- [ ] Create tag: `git tag -a v{VERSION} -m "Release v{VERSION}"`
- [ ] Push tag: `git push origin v{VERSION}`
- [ ] Release workflow runs automatically
- [ ] npm package published
- [ ] GitHub Release created
- [ ] Post-release smoke test passes
